previousDayImpact: Argentina's victory provided a significant boost to Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, Team Jordan, Team koyn, and Team Camouflage Cndm, each gaining 11 points.
The Egypt-Australia draw split the field, with Team Godfather and Brent's Daddy gaining 9 points from Egypt, while Bijan Mustard and Team Camouflage Cndm picked up only 1 point from Australia.
Team Mack and Bijan Mustard benefited from Colombia's win, securing 9 points each.
leaderboardSummary: Team Jordan climbed 3 spots to 4th place after a strong 11-point gain from Argentina.
Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz moved up 2 ranks to 2nd place, while Team Godfather maintained their lead at the top of the table.
Team Megatronless saw the largest decline, falling 5 spots to 10th place after failing to gain points.
leverageWatch: Team Godfather holds a unique advantage in the Morocco-Canada match with Canada, while Team Pahl and Team Mack look for points from Morocco.
Bijan Mustard faces a high-stakes scenario in the France-Paraguay match, as they have picked both teams and will gain points regardless of the outcome.
